content: Color.withOpacity(double) and Color.withValues(alpha: double) both assert the value is within 0.0..1.0 -- passing a negative or >1 value throws an assertion error (debug) or produces undefined/clamped-at-construction behavior. Confirmed via flutter/flutter GitHub issues (#56092 et al) and api.flutter.dev docs. Any progress-derived opacity formula (e.g. 1 - p*2.3) must be explicitly clamped with .clamp(0.0, 1.0) before being passed to withOpacity/withValues.
